bead.title: refactor(agent): unify providerStatus/checkResult/routeCandidateStatus into shared Probe primitive
bead.description:
Opus epic review (2026-04-15) flagged 4 disconnected provider-status schemas across the visibility commands:
- providerStatusEntry in cli/cmd/agent_providers.go:17
- checkResult in cli/cmd/agent_check.go:17
- routeCandidateStatus in cli/cmd/agent_route_status.go:69
- inline probing in cli/cmd/agent_models.go:95

Each reimplements oai.DiscoverModels + status classification with different timeouts (3s/3s/5s/5s) and different result shapes. A scripting user has to learn four schemas to read the same underlying data.

Introduce a single providerstatus.Probe(ctx, cfg, name) returning one struct that all four commands render.
bead.acceptance: (1) cli/internal/agent/providerstatus (or similar) package exists with a Probe function returning a unified status struct. (2) providers/models/check/route-status all render from the same underlying struct. (3) Timeout is consistent (or documented per caller). (4) Existing command output is backwards-compatible (same fields surfaced to users).
